notableEvents.label: Travis Bazzana plunked
notableEvents.detail: Royals challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was upheld: Travis Bazzana hit by pitch.

notableEvents.label: Passed ball run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Passed ball by catcher Carter Jensen. Petey Halpin scores.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Travis Bazzana steals (4) 3rd base. Brayan Rocchio steals (4) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Vinnie Pasquantino GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Vinnie Pasquantino grounds into a double play, second baseman Travis Bazzana to shortstop Brayan Rocchio to first baseman Kyle Manzardo. Bobby Witt Jr. out at 2nd. Vinnie Pasquantino out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nick Loftin pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nick Loftin out on a sacrifice fly to center fielder Petey Halpin. Carter Jensen scores.

notableEvents.label: Lane Thomas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Lane Thomas walks. Jac Caglianone to 3rd. Isaac Collins to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Nick Loftin pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nick Loftin doubles (4) on a fly ball to left fielder Steven Kwan. Isaac Collins to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Lane Thomas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Lane Thomas out on a sacrifice fly to left fielder Steven Kwan. Isaac Collins scores.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game
